description: Product Description DIY Mastery with BILBAU Discover BILBAU - your ultimate DIY partner! We empower hobbyists and professionals with top-tier renovation and construction tools. Crafted with precision , our products ensure every project shines. From small touch-ups to full-scale constructions, we've got the right tool for every job . Join a community of passionate DIYers who trust our brand for quality, durability, and innovation. Elevate your DIY game with BILBAU . BILBAU Mortar Mixing Paddle HEX - The DIYer's Essential Tool Ultimate Precision Featuring a HEX 80mm x 400mm design with an 8mm hexagonal shaft and a 6mm diameter lower ring , this paddle is designed for fine-tuned mixing control. PERFECT FOR SMALL MIXES: Mix plaster, mortar & more! STRONG BUILD: Galvanised steel design ensures durability. VERSATILE USE: Ideal for paint, cement & DIY projects. USER-FRIENDLY: Fits regular drills, easy to clean & use! Approved From its stellar performance in scorching 30+ degree heat to effortlessly blending various materials, the BILBAU mixing paddle has received a thumbs up from numerous users. It's not just about mixing; it's about making the process efficient , clean , and hassle-free! Efficient Mixing Power Highly Efficient Customers rave about how it easily pulls materials from the bottom for a pre-mix and its effectiveness at achieving a smooth, uniform mix. Simply rotate clockwise at lower speeds for pre-mixing and then counterclockwise at higher speeds for the final mix! Build Quality Constructed with attention to detail, this paddle impresses with its strong welds and well-balanced design. It feels sturdy, reliable, and is noted for being well made. Built to Last Though compact, its build speaks volumes. Strong welds, well-balanced design, and quality materials ensure a lasting tool. Whether you're mixing for DIY projects or professional tasks , this paddle stands by you, turning any regular drill into a mixing maestro. The BILBAU Mortar Mixing Paddle HEX is a reliable , sturdy , and highly efficient tool that has garnered positive feedback from numerous users. It's more than just a mixing paddle; it's a blend of design , functionality , and reliability !
